job_title: Machine Learning Engineer II - Marketplace Pricing & Incentives
job_nlp_title: Machine Learning Engineer II - Marketplace Pricing & Incentives
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Optimization Algorithms, ML Frameworks, Python, Go
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Optimization Algorithms:0.5, ML Frameworks:1.0, Python:1.0, Go:1.0
must_have_quals: 2+ years of experience in an ML/optimization role, or a PhD in a relevant field (CS, OR, EE, Statistics, etc.), Expertise in machine learning and optimization algorithms, Experience with ML frameworks, Proficiency in at least one coding language such as Python, Go, or Java, Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively with cross-functional partners, Strong sense of ownership to drive projects end-to-end
preferred_quals: Experience in translating ambiguous business problems into structured, principled technical solutions, Experience in developing and deploying optimization algorithms in production, Experience in causal inference and experimental design, Experience in evaluating ML models in a production environment
core_responsibilities: Leading the design and implementation of ML-driven solutions to meet business requirements, Managing end-to-end project execution, from scoping and offline evaluation to experimentation, production, and post-launch monitoring, Developing and refining ML models and optimization algorithms to improve simulation accuracy and overall performance, Collaborating with cross-functional teams, including product, operations, and science partners
job_summary: Uber is a leading technology company that operates in the transportation sector. They are seeking a Machine Learning Engineer II to develop and implement ML and optimization solutions to enhance pricing and incentive efficiency within their Marketplace team.
